## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what this PR changes and why. -->

## Test plan

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Tested against a real Custom Connector, or describe why local testing was sufficient

## Checklist

- [ ] README updated if behavior changed (tools table, environment variables, error codes)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] No `console.log` / debug statements
- [ ] No fallbacks introduced (errors are propagated, not swallowed)
- [ ] Linked to the Issue or Discussion that motivated this change (if any)
